zh.Hethersett, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可海黑瑟特

zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Driby於1284年出生在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾時，她的父親Robert de Driby31歲，母親Joan Tattershall29歲。她於從1304年1月9日到1305年1月8日與Sir William Bernanke在英國林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1341年4月12日在英國諾福爾可海黑瑟特享年57歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可海黑瑟特。

zh-hans.Hethersett, Norfolk, England: 英国諾福爾可海黑瑟特

zh-hans.Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Driby于1284年出生在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾时，她的父亲Robert de Driby31岁，母亲Joan Tattershall29岁。她于从1304年1月9日到1305年1月8日与Sir William Bernanke在英国林可爾史爾塔特沙拉爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1341年4月12日在英国諾福爾可海黑瑟特享年57岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可海黑瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Driby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Riby (Lincs) or perhaps Ribby (Lancs); on the latter name,  see also  Rigby  . See also   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  .

variants.name: Rigby
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Ribby in Lancashire, named with Old Scandanavian hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. Compare Rigsby .

variants.name: Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames
meanings: English: locative name, probably from Gilderdale (Forest) in Alston (Cumb), as suggested by   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  , rather than from Gildersdale in Warter (ER Yorks), as suggested by   Reaney and Wilson  .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Driby was born in 1284, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert de Driby, was 31 and her mother, Joan Tattershall, was 29. She married Sir William Bernanke from 9 January 1304 to 8 January 1305, in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 April 1341, in Hethersett, Norfolk, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Hethersett, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Driby est née en 1284, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Driby, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Tattershall, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Bernanke du 9 janvier 1304 au 8 janvier 1305, à Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 avril 1341, à Hethersett, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Hethersett, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Driby 1284 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Driby 31 und ihre Mutter Joan Tattershall 29. Sie hat von 9. Januar 1304 bis 8. Januar 1305 in Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England Sir William Bernanke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. April 1341 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Hethersett, Norfolk, England und wurde in Hethersett, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Driby è nata il nel 1284 nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Driby, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Joan Tattershall, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Bernanke da 9 gennaio 1304 a 8 gennaio 1305, nel Tattershall, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 12 aprile 1341, nel Hethersett, Norfolk, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Hethersett, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Dribyが1284年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルで生まれた時，父Robert de Dribyは31歳，母Joan Tattershallは29歳であった。から1304年1月9日まで1305年1月8日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアタッテルシャルでSir William Bernankeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1341年4月12日にイギリスノーフォルクヘスエルセットで57歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクヘスエルセットにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Driby(이)가 1284년 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Driby(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Tattershall(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1304년 1월 9일부터 1305년 1월 8일까지 영국 링코실르 타터샤에서 Sir William Bernanke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1341년 4월 12일 영국 노르폴크 헤더세트에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 헤더세트에 묻혔다.

pt.1304: de 9 de janeiro de 1304 a 8 de janeiro de 1305
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Driby nasceu em 1284, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Driby, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Tattershall, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Bernanke de 9 de janeiro de 1304 a 8 de janeiro de 1305, em Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de abril de 1341, em Hethersett, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Hethersett, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Driby родилась в 1284 г. в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Driby было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Tattershall, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Bernanke с 9 января 1304 по 8 января 1305 в местности таттиршолл, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 апреля 1341 г. в местности хетирсетт, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности хетирсетт, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Driby nació en 1284, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Driby, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Joan Tattershall, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir William Bernanke desde 9 de enero de 1304 hasta 8 de enero de 1305, en Tattershall, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 12 de abril de 1341, en Hethersett, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Hethersett, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
